

```{r}
df <- read.delim("C:/Users/Ast/Desktop/АЛКОГОЛИКИ/data_prs/merged_pheno_prs.txt", header=T)
```

```{r}
df$audit_score <- rowSums(df[, 2:11], na.rm = TRUE)
df$alc_binary <- ifelse(df$audit_score >= 15, 1, 0)
df$gender_binary <- ifelse(df$gender == "female", 0, 1)
```
Ratio of AUDIT categories by polygenic score percentiles
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df <- df %>%

  mutate(
    audit_zone = case_when(
      audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
      audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
      audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
      audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%
  
  
  mutate(
    percentile = ntile(PGS002752_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM, 100)
  )


plot_df <- df %>%
  group_by(percentile, audit_zone) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(percentile) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))


plot_df$audit_zone <- factor(plot_df$audit_zone, levels = c("4","3","2","1"))


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = percentile, y = prop, fill = audit_zone)) +
  geom_area(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "1" = "#e41a1c",
      "2" = "#377eb8",
      "3" = "#4daf4a",
      "4" = "#984ea3"
    ),
    name = "AUDIT zone"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Ratio of Audit zones, PGS002752",
    x = "PRS percentile",
    y = "AUDIT zones ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = percentile, y = prop, fill = audit_zone)) +
  geom_area(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "1" = "#e41a1c",
      "2" = "#377eb8",
      "3" = "#4daf4a",
      "4" = "#984ea3"
    ),
    name = "AUDIT zone"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PGS002752",
    x = "PRS percentile",
    y = "AUDIT zones ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )
```
Separately for 003376 (inverted graph)
Ratio of AUDIT categories by polygenic score percentiles
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)


df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    audit_zone = case_when(
      audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
      audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
      audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
      audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%
  mutate(
    percentile = 101 - ntile(PGS003376_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM, 100)
  )


plot_df <- df %>%
  group_by(percentile, audit_zone) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(percentile) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()


plot_df$audit_zone <- factor(
  plot_df$audit_zone,
  levels = c("4", "3", "2", "1")
)


ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x = percentile,
           y = prop,
           fill = audit_zone)) +
  geom_area(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "1" = "#e41a1c",
      "2" = "#377eb8",
      "3" = "#4daf4a",
      "4" = "#984ea3"
    ),
    name = "AUDIT zone"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
    limits = c(1, 100)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PGS003376",
    x = "PRS percentile",
    y = "AUDIT zones ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18)
  )
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df <- df %>%

  mutate(
    audit_zone = case_when(
      audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
      audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
      audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
      audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%

  mutate(prs_decile = ntile(PGS002752_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM, 10))


plot_df <- df %>%
  group_by(audit_zone, prs_decile) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(audit_zone) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))


plot_df$audit_zone <- factor(plot_df$audit_zone, levels = c("1","2","3","4"))


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = factor(prs_decile), y = prop, fill = factor(prs_decile))) +
    geom_col(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 1) +  # полностью непрозрачные
    facet_wrap(~audit_zone, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(
        audit_zone = c("1"="Zone 1", "2"="Zone 2", "3"="Zone 3", "4"="Zone 4")
    )) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
    "1" = "#fcc5c0",  # было #fde0dd
            "2" = "#fb8da0",  # было #fa9fb5
            "3" = "#b8e6b0",  # было #ccebc5
            "4" = "#8cc2d9",  # было #a6bddb
            "5" = "#fdd9a8",  # было #ffedcc
            "6" = "#ffe64d",  # было #ffffb3
            "7" = "#c7c7c7",  # было #d9d9d9
            "8" = "#99b8d9",  # было #b3cde3
            "9" = "#f99a92",  # было #fbb4ae
            "10" = "#c9aed4"  # было #decbe4
        ),
        name = "PRS Decile"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(breaks = 1:10, labels = 1:10) +
    labs(
        title = "PGS002752",
        x = "PRS Decile",
        y = "Proportion of samples in zone"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18),      # подписи осей X и Y
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),       # цифры/деления на осях
        plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold" ),      # заголовок графика
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17),     # текст в легенде
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14)  
    )
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df <- df %>%

    mutate(
        audit_zone = case_when(
            audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
            audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
            audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
            audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%

    mutate(prs_decile = ntile(PGS003376_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM, 10),
           prs_decile = 11 - prs_decile)

plot_df <- df %>%
    group_by(audit_zone, prs_decile) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(audit_zone) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n))


plot_df$audit_zone <- factor(plot_df$audit_zone, levels = c("1","2","3","4"))


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = factor(prs_decile), y = prop, fill = factor(prs_decile))) +
    geom_col(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 1) +  # полностью непрозрачные
    facet_wrap(~audit_zone, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(
        audit_zone = c("1"="Zone 1", "2"="Zone 2", "3"="Zone 3", "4"="Zone 4")
    )) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
            "1" = "#fcc5c0",  # было #fde0dd
            "2" = "#fb8da0",  # было #fa9fb5
            "3" = "#b8e6b0",  # было #ccebc5
            "4" = "#8cc2d9",  # было #a6bddb
            "5" = "#fdd9a8",  # было #ffedcc
            "6" = "#ffe64d",  # было #ffffb3
            "7" = "#c7c7c7",  # было #d9d9d9
            "8" = "#99b8d9",  # было #b3cde3
            "9" = "#f99a92",  # было #fbb4ae
            "10" = "#c9aed4"  # было #decbe4
        ),
        name = "PRS Decile"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(breaks = 1:10, labels = 1:10) +
    labs(
        title = "PGS003376",
        x = "PRS Decile",
        y = "Proportion of samples in zone"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18),      
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),     
        plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold" ),    
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17),     
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14)  
    )
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(tidyr)

# Список PRS
prs_list <- c(
  "PGS003376_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM",
  "PGS002752_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM",
  "PGS000204_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM"
)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    audit_zone = case_when(
      audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
      audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
      audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
      audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%
  mutate(
    zone_1_vs_234 = ifelse(audit_zone == "1", 0, 1),
    zone_1_vs_4   = ifelse(audit_zone == "4", 1,
                           ifelse(audit_zone == "1", 0, NA))
  )


calc_or_prs <- function(df, prs_name, outcome){

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      prs_decile = ntile(.data[[prs_name]], 10),
      prs_decile = factor(prs_decile)
    )

  fit <- glm(
    as.formula(paste(outcome, "~ prs_decile")),
    family = binomial,
    data = df
  )

  broom::tidy(fit, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(prs = prs_name)
}


or_list <- list()

for(prs in prs_list){

  or_list[[paste0(prs, "_234")]] <-
    calc_or_prs(df, prs, "zone_1_vs_234") %>%
    mutate(comparison = "zone 1 vs 2/3/4")

  or_list[[paste0(prs, "_4")]] <-
    calc_or_prs(df, prs, "zone_1_vs_4") %>%
    mutate(comparison = "zone 1 vs 4")
}


or_plot_df <- bind_rows(or_list)


or_plot_df <- or_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    term = gsub("prs_decile", "", term),
    term = gsub("[^0-9]", "", term),
    term = paste0("D", term),
    term = factor(term, levels = paste0("D", 2:10))
  )


ggplot(or_plot_df,
       aes(x = term, y = estimate, color = prs, group = prs)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
    width = 0.2,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~comparison) +
  labs(
    x = "PRS Decile (ref = D1)",
    y = "Odds Ratio (vs D1)",
    color = "PGS"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(tidyr)


prs_list <- c(
    "PGS003376_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM",
    "PGS002752_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM",
    "PGS000204_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM"
)


df <- df %>%
    mutate(
        audit_zone = case_when(
            audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
            audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
            audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
            audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(audit_zone)) %>%
    mutate(
        zone_1_vs_234 = ifelse(audit_zone == "1", 0, 1),
        zone_1_vs_4   = ifelse(audit_zone == "4", 1,
                               ifelse(audit_zone == "1", 0, NA))
    )


calc_or_prs <- function(df, prs_name, outcome){
    
    prs_decile <- ntile(df[[prs_name]], 10)
    
 
    if (prs_name == "PGS003376_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM") {
        prs_decile <- 11 - prs_decile
    }
    
    df2 <- df %>%
        mutate(
            prs_decile = factor(prs_decile)
        )
    
    fit <- glm(
        as.formula(paste(outcome, "~ prs_decile")),
        family = binomial,
        data = df2
    )
    
    broom::tidy(fit,
                exponentiate = TRUE,
                conf.int = TRUE) %>%
        filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
        mutate(prs = prs_name)
}


or_list <- list()

for(prs in prs_list){
    
    or_list[[paste0(prs, "_234")]] <-
        calc_or_prs(df, prs, "zone_1_vs_234") %>%
        mutate(comparison = "zone 1 vs 2/3/4")
    
    or_list[[paste0(prs, "_4")]] <-
        calc_or_prs(df, prs, "zone_1_vs_4") %>%
        mutate(comparison = "zone 1 vs 4")
}

or_plot_df <- bind_rows(or_list)


or_plot_df <- or_plot_df %>%
    mutate(
        term = gsub("prs_decile", "", term),
        term = gsub("[^0-9]", "", term),
        term = paste0("D", term),
        term = factor(term, levels = paste0("D", 2:10))
    )


or_plot_df <- or_plot_df %>%
    mutate(
        prs = sub("_.*", "", prs)  
    )


ggplot(or_plot_df,
       aes(x = term, y = estimate, color = prs, group = prs)) +
    geom_point(
        size = 3,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
        aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
        width = 0.2,
        linewidth = 0.8,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
    facet_wrap(~comparison) +
    labs(
        title = "Odds Ratios for PGS deciles",
        x = "PRS Decile (ref = D1)",
        y = "Odds Ratio (vs D1)",
        color = "PGS"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(
            size = 24,
            face = "bold",
            hjust = 0.5
        ),
        axis.title.x = element_text(
            size = 20,
            face = "bold"
        ),
        axis.title.y = element_text(
            size = 20,
            face = "bold"
        ),
        axis.text.x = element_text(
            size = 16,
            angle = 45,
            hjust = 1
        ),
        axis.text.y = element_text(
            size = 16
        ),
        strip.text = element_text(
            size = 18,
            face = "bold"
        ),
        legend.title = element_text(
            size = 18,
            face = "bold"
        ),
        legend.text = element_text(
            size = 16
        ),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.margin = margin(t = 10)
    )

```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. Создаем зоны AUDIT и группу по PRS (пример порога = медиана)
df_plot <- df %>%
    mutate(
        audit_zone = case_when(
            audit_score >= 0  & audit_score <= 7  ~ "1",
            audit_score >= 8  & audit_score <= 15 ~ "2",
            audit_score >= 16 & audit_score <= 19 ~ "3",
            audit_score >= 20 & audit_score <= 40 ~ "4",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        group_204 = ifelse(
            PGS000204_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM > median(PGS000204_hmPOS_GRCh37_SUM, na.rm = TRUE),
            "Above threshold",
            "Below threshold"
        )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(audit_zone))

# 2. Считаем доли внутри каждой AUDIT зоны
df_summary <- df_plot %>%
    group_by(audit_zone, group_204) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(audit_zone) %>%
    mutate(ratio = n / sum(n))

# 3. (опционально) χ² тест
tbl <- table(df_plot$audit_zone, df_plot$group_204)
chi_p <- chisq.test(tbl)$p.value

# 4. Строим график
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = audit_zone, y = ratio, fill = group_204)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.8) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Above threshold" = "#FF3B3B",
                                 "Below threshold" = "#78AFC6")) +
    labs(
        title = paste0("Groups ratio in AUDIT zones, PGS000204\n",
                       "Chi-square p = ", signif(chi_p, 3)),
        x = "AUDIT zone",
        y = "Ratio of groups in AUDIT zones",
        fill = ""
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold",hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13)
    )
```
